commands.name: probe
commands.description: Probe an audio file with ffprobe -> duration, codec, channels, sample rate, tags.

commands.name: transcribe
commands.description: Transcribe audio to timestamped segments with faster-whisper (offline, local). Write the transcript to a file so later steps can read it.

commands.name: sentiment_segments
commands.description: Group a transcript's segments into consecutive runs of the same sentiment, with timestamp ranges. Reads the transcript from transcribe (no positional source arg).

commands.name: segment_silence
commands.description: Split audio into non-silent segments via ffmpeg silencedetect - useful to chunk a long recording into spans of speech.
